title: U.S.-style birthright citizenship is uncommon around the world
summary_en: 32 other countries around the worldĀ have birthright citizenship laws that are substantially similar to the U.S.Ā Another 50 or so countries have more limited variations of birthright citizenship.

title: About 9% of U.S. births in 2023 were to unauthorized or temporary legal immigrant mothers
summary_en: Generally, the trends in births to unauthorized immigrants follow the growth and decline of the unauthorized immigrant population.
